<!-- No feature before RFC. No code before architecture. (RFC-0000 §22) -->

## Class

<!-- Class 2 (substantive) or Class 3 (constitutional). If disputed, the higher class applies. See RFC-0001 §5. -->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what is proposed and why, readable by someone who reads nothing else. -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem exists today. Why solving it serves the mission (RFC-0000 §2). -->

## Specification sketch

<!-- Precise enough that a full draft can be written from it. No hidden transformations. -->

## Premortem (mandatory — RFC-0000 §18)

1. What could fail?
2. What assumptions are wrong?
3. What biases may emerge?
4. How is reversibility guaranteed?
5. How is explainability preserved?

## Validation criteria

<!-- How FE-008 will measure whether this works: benchmarks, thresholds. Required (RFC-0001 §6). -->
